'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 3''' is the third issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in spring [[1995]]. The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 3, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with ''[[1995 Topps Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back Widevision]]'' promotional card #0, a Topps Finest chromium [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] trading card, and a ''[[Star Wars]]'' milk cap featuring either [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] or [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. This issue also included the fold-out poster article ''[[The Essential Guide to Star Wars Aliens]]''.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
